DELAEYD REPORT. NWS meteorologists on a storm survey team confirmed an EF1 tornado with estimated peak winds of 100 mph and a path length of 3.25 miles. The tornado began 0.5 miles south southeast of the intersection between E Valencia Rd. and S Kolb Rd. near a commercial fulfillment center. It moved southeast and then east along E Valencia Rd. The tornado then crossed E Old Vail Rd. and entered the north end of the Rita Ranch neighborhood. The tornado then weakened before eventually dissipating 0.1 miles west of S Frost Dr. The tornado was on the ground for approximately 10 minutes and uprooted multiple large trees... tossed and overturned a metal shipping container... and caused other minor tree and roof damage. The strongest winds occurred as the tornado was immediately west of and as it crossed E Old Vail Rd. where EF1 damage was located. EF0 damage was observed elsewhere along the path.
